title: polystichum lobatum var. squarrosum
intro: Polystichum lobatum var. squarrosum, also known as the variable leather fern, is a type of fern that is native to the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, as well as providing protection against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Polystichum lobatum var. squarrosum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
